questions.question:
A Deployment named `bundle-api` in namespace `projectedvolume-lab` is failing because its projected ConfigMap and Secret volume wiring is wrong.

Fix the workload so that:
- it projects ConfigMap `bundle-config`
- it projects Secret `bundle-secret`
- the ConfigMap item path is `config/app.conf`
- the Secret item path is `secret/token`
- the projected volume mounts read-only at `/etc/bundle`
- the Deployment becomes Available
- the running container can read `/etc/bundle/config/app.conf` and `/etc/bundle/secret/token`

Do not replace the projected sources with inline data. Repair the Deployment volume wiring in place.

verification.description: Deployment bundle-api uses the intended projected source names, item paths, and mount settings
Deployment bundle-api becomes Available after the projected volume repair
The running container reads the projected ConfigMap and Secret files from /etc/bundle
